name: Berry Best Fried Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch, and water; add berries. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil. Stir for 2 minutes, then set aside to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt. Add oil and buttermilk, stirring until the dough forms a ball.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to an 1/8-inch thickness. Cut into ten (10) 4-5 inch circles.
4. Place 1 tablespoon of blueberry filling in the center of each circle. Fold over and seal edges with a fork.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Fry pies for about 1 1/2 minutes per side until golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
YIELD: 10 servings
